inputs.titre: Signature du Civil Rights Act aux États-Unis

reason: The image depicts a group of people, including the president (signing a document). The clothing and room furnishings appear generally consistent with the 1960s, though some modern tailoring and styles might be present. No major anachronisms are immediately apparent, and there are no fantasy elements. Some of the haircuts and tailoring on the suits might be a bit too modern but the general ambiance and composition are good enough to be considered a historically plausible scene from the 1964 signing of the Civil Rights Act.
